title: Apocalyptic Resistance
description: A modpack that has zombies and parasite infections and more. Its in beta expect bugs.
body:
## Apocalyptic Resistance – Beta Release
Another one of my modpacks...

Prepare for the ultimate test of survival in a world overrun by chaos. Apocalyptic Resistance is a hardcore modpack featuring relentless zombies, deadly parasite infections, and an unforgiving environment where every moment is a battle for survival.

🧟‍♂️ Zombies Everywhere – The undead roam in massive hordes, growing stronger and smarter over time.
🦠 Parasitic Threats – Mysterious infections spread rapidly, mutating creatures into terrifying monstrosities.
⚔️ Brutal Combat & Realism – Limited resources, realistic damage, and enhanced AI make survival more intense.
🌍 Dystopian World – Cities lie in ruins, nature fights back, and the apocalypse is in full force.
🛠 Craft, Scavenge, Survive – Find shelter, craft weapons, and form strategies to outlast the horrors.

This modpack is still in beta, so expect bugs, tweaks, and improvements as we refine the experience. Think you have what it takes to resist the apocalypse? Try to survive—if you can.

🔗 [Support](https://modrinth.com/modpack/apocalyptic-resistance/)
